name: BB:FalsePositive: Web Server False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from web servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: Web Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Web Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (2500212) DELETED WEB-MISC Tomcat directory traversal attempt, (2500213) SERVER-APACHE Apache Tomcat view source attempt, (2500875) SERVER-WEBAPP /cgi-bin/ access, (2500211) SERVER-WEBAPP weblogic/tomcat .jsp view source attempt
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Web Servers, BB:HostReference: Web Servers
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Web Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event QID is one of the following (2500212) DELETED WEB-MISC Tomcat directory traversal attempt, (2500213) SERVER-APACHE Apache Tomcat view source attempt, (2500875) SERVER-WEBAPP /cgi-bin/ access, (2500211) SERVER-WEBAPP weblogic/tomcat .jsp view source attempt
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Web Servers, BB:HostReference: Web Servers
